info.title: dotnet-workflow-generator
info.description: A .NET global tool to generate workflows for GitHub Actions based on project configuration and user inputs

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

arguments.name: Path
arguments.description: The path to a .csproj or .fsproj file, or to a directory containing a .NET Core solution/project. If none is specified, the current directory will be used.
